article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.1. Attachment 2 - Council Report LLA 25-12 - 102-6462 Kingsway (Solo Karaoke) dated November 25, 2025 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on liquor licence for Solo Karaoke on Kingsway, Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on whether to recommend a liquor primary licence — meaning a licence where alcohol sales are the main business — for Solo Karaoke at 6462 Kingsway. The venue wants to serve alcohol daily from 9 a.m. to 2 a.m. and allow minors in until 10 p.m. with a responsible adult.
briefs.action_required: Attend the November 25, 2025 Council meeting to have your say before the vote.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council meeting — Solo Karaoke liquor primary licence recommendation vote
